# 1.0.5 / 2022-02-14

  * Fix parsing quoted parameters with trailing semicolon
  * deps: update development dependencies

# 1.0.4 / 2019-04-27

  * Fix parsing parameters with quoted equals sign
  * deps: update development dependencies

# 1.0.3 / 2017-09-10

  * Fix handling of empty parameters
  * perf: improve header parsing speed

# 1.0.2 / 2016-05-09

  * Fix parameter handling when type is invalid
  * perf: use stricter regex for parsing

# 1.0.1 / 2015-08-13

  * Fix type parsing when with trailing LWS
  * perf: reduce type parsing complexity

# 1.0.0 / 2015-02-01

  * Initial stable release
  * Add `format` function
  * Add `parse` function

# 0.0.0 / 2014-09-28

  * Initial implementation
  * Add basic validation of content-type format
